name: undecanoate to H2O
summary: A 12-step route from undecanoate to H2O, ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: undecanoate + ATP + CoA = undecanoyl-CoA + AMP + diphosphate
reactions.equation: undecanoate + ATP + CoA = undecanoyl-CoA + AMP + diphosphate
